title: cotinus velutinus
intro: Cotinus velutinus, also known as Velvet Leaf or Smoke Bush, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cotinus velutinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Cotinus velutinus typically include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or using a solvent to extract the active compounds.
